mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cv_profiles (user_id, full_name, title, status, is_public, view_count) VALUES (#{userId}, #{fullName}, #{title}, #{status}, #{isPublic}, #{viewCount})
mapper.select: SELECT p.id AS cv_id, p.user_id, p.full_name, p.title, p.email, p.phone, p.avatar_url, p.status, p.is_public, p.view_count, p.published_at, p.created_date, p.updated_date FROM cv_profiles p WHERE p.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY p.created_date DESC

SELECT p.id AS cv_id, p.user_id, p.full_name, p.title, p.email, p.phone, p.avatar_url, p.status, p.is_public, p.view_count, p.published_at, p.created_date, p.updated_date FROM cv_profiles p WHERE p.id = #{id} AND p.deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT -- cv_profiles p.id AS cv_id, p.user_id, p.full_name, p.title, p.birthday, p.phone, p.email, p.github_url, p.linkedin_url, p.website_url, p.address, p.summary_short, p.summary_long, p.avatar_url, p.status AS cv_status, p.is_public, p.view_count, p.published_at, p.deleted_at, p.created_date AS cv_created_date, p.updated_date AS cv_updated_date, -- cv_skills s.id AS skill_id, s.skill_category, s.skill_name, s.skill_level, s.display_order AS skill_display_order, s.created_date AS skill_created_date, -- cv_educations e.id AS edu_id, e.school_name, e.major, e.degree, e.gpa, e.description AS edu_description, e.start_date AS edu_start_date, e.end_date AS edu_end_date, e.created_date AS edu_created_date, -- cv_projects pr.id AS project_id, pr.project_name, pr.company_name, pr.team_size, pr.role_in_project, pr.tech_frontend, pr.tech_backend, pr.tech_devops_tools, pr.url_demo, pr.start_date AS project_start_date, pr.end_date AS project_end_date, pr.created_date AS project_created_date, -- cv_project_tasks pt.id AS task_id, pt.task_description, -- cv_interests i.id AS interest_id, i.interest_name, i.display_order AS interest_display_order, i.created_date AS interest_created_date, -- cv_certifications c.id AS cert_id, c.cert_name, c.issuing_organization, c.issue_date, c.expiration_date, c.credential_id, c.credential_url, c.created_date AS cert_created_date, -- cv_activities act.id AS activity_id, act.organization AS activity_organization, act.role AS activity_role, act.description AS activity_description, act.start_date AS activity_start_date, act.end_date AS activity_end_date FROM cv_profiles p LEFT JOIN cv_skills s ON s.cv_id = p.id LEFT JOIN cv_educations e ON e.cv_id = p.id LEFT JOIN cv_projects pr ON pr.cv_id = p.id LEFT JOIN cv_project_tasks pt ON pt.project_id = pr.id LEFT JOIN cv_interests i ON i.cv_id = p.id LEFT JOIN cv_certifications c ON c.cv_id = p.id LEFT JOIN cv_activities act ON act.cv_id = p.id WHERE p.id = #{id} AND p.deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT p.id AS cv_id, p.user_id, p.full_name, p.title, p.email, p.phone, p.avatar_url, p.status, p.is_public, p.view_count, p.published_at, p.created_date, p.updated_date FROM cv_profiles p WHERE p.user_id = #{userId} AND p.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY p.created_date DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT p.id AS cv_id, p.user_id, p.full_name, p.title, p.birthday, p.phone, p.email, p.github_url, p.linkedin_url, p.website_url, p.address, p.summary_short, p.summary_long, p.avatar_url, p.status AS cv_status, p.is_public, p.view_count, p.published_at, p.deleted_at, p.created_date AS cv_created_date, p.updated_date AS cv_updated_date, s.id AS skill_id, s.skill_category, s.skill_name, s.skill_level, s.display_order AS skill_display_order, s.created_date AS skill_created_date, e.id AS edu_id, e.school_name, e.major, e.degree, e.gpa, e.description AS edu_description, e.start_date AS edu_start_date, e.end_date AS edu_end_date, e.created_date AS edu_created_date, pr.id AS project_id, pr.project_name, pr.company_name, pr.team_size, pr.role_in_project, pr.tech_frontend, pr.tech_backend, pr.tech_devops_tools, pr.url_demo, pr.start_date AS project_start_date, pr.end_date AS project_end_date, pr.created_date AS project_created_date, pt.id AS task_id, pt.task_description, i.id AS interest_id, i.interest_name, i.display_order AS interest_display_order, i.created_date AS interest_created_date, c.id AS cert_id, c.cert_name, c.issuing_organization, c.issue_date, c.expiration_date, c.credential_id, c.credential_url, c.created_date AS cert_created_date, act.id AS activity_id, act.organization AS activity_organization, act.role AS activity_role, act.description AS activity_description, act.start_date AS activity_start_date, act.end_date AS activity_end_date FROM cv_profiles p LEFT JOIN cv_skills s ON s.cv_id = p.id LEFT JOIN cv_educations e ON e.cv_id = p.id LEFT JOIN cv_projects pr ON pr.cv_id = p.id LEFT JOIN cv_project_tasks pt ON pt.project_id = pr.id LEFT JOIN cv_interests i ON i.cv_id = p.id LEFT JOIN cv_certifications c ON c.cv_id = p.id LEFT JOIN cv_activities act ON act.cv_id = p.id WHERE p.id = ( SELECT p2.id FROM cv_profiles p2 WHERE p2.user_id = #{userId} AND p2.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY p2.created_date DESC LIMIT 1 )
mapper.update: UPDATE cv_profiles SET full_name = #{dto.fullName}, title = #{dto.title}, birthday = #{dto.birthday}, phone = #{dto.phone}, email = #{dto.email}, github_url = #{dto.githubUrl}, linkedin_url = #{dto.linkedinUrl}, website_url = #{dto.websiteUrl}, address = #{dto.address}, summary_short = #{dto.summaryShort}, summary_long = #{dto.summaryLong}, avatar_url = #{dto.avatarUrl}, updated_date = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL

UPDATE cv_profiles SET status = #{dto.status}, is_public = CASE WHEN #{dto.status} = 'PUBLISHED' THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END, published_at = CASE WHEN #{dto.status} = 'PUBLISHED' AND published_at IS NULL THEN CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ELSE published_at END, updated_date = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE cv_profiles SET avatar_url = #{avatarUrl}, updated_date = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{cvId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT avatar_url FROM cv_profiles WHERE id = #{cvId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
